_comment: The Nodes registry — single source of truth for the front door. Add a Node = add an entry here, push, and `git -C /var/www/nodes pull` on the box. slug → install URLs (/nodes/<slug>/{mac,windows}) and hosted app (/nodes/<slug>/app/). repo → github.com/pauldevelopai/<repo>. status: 'live' (shows install + online) or 'soon'. hosted: true if it runs online on the box. 'desc' may contain simple inline HTML (e.g. <em>).

nodes.name: Audience Signal
nodes.desc: Reads a Word or PDF matrix of your published stories and their Facebook reach + engagement, and shows what your audience actually rewards — by beat, format, headline shape and over time. The signal is engagement rate, not raw reach, so boosting and the algorithm don't fool it.

nodes.name: Podcast Studio
nodes.desc: Train a journalist's voice from a short sample, then turn a transcript into an AI-generated audio podcast in that voice. Audio and keys stay on your own machine.

nodes.name: Election Watch
nodes.desc: AI-assisted claim verification and origin-tracking of suspicious content, tuned for the August 2026 Zambian elections. Verify claims against a corpus of past examples, and analyse where foreign-manufactured content came from.
